title: SEC, CIMA Partner on Compliance with Reporting Standards - FinancialEDGE
description: The Securities and Exchange Commission is set to partner with the Chartered Institute of Management Accounting (CIMA) to ensure compliance with reporting on financial statements by public institutions. Acting Director General of the Securities and Exchange Commission, Dr. Emomotimi Agama stated this during a meeting with a Team from CIMA led by its President and
html: The Securities and Exchange Commission is set to partner with the Chartered Institute of Management Accounting (CIMA) to ensure compliance with reporting on financial statements by public institutions.
